# kSecDigestLengthAttribute

**Global Variable**

The digest length.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecDigestLengthAttribute: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber] that contains the digest length.
title: kSecDigestLengthAttribute
